Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling A Response To Inspection Demands And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: STANLEY DALE RADTKE, ESQ. for defendant and moving party; no other appearance stated. Tentative adopted.

DEFENDANT ADEL ABDEL AL GHAZALI's Motion for Order Compelling a Response from Plaintiff to its Inspection Demands is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to properly respond and produce the requested documents to defendant by August 6, 2010. Defendant is awarded sanctions against Plaintiff in the amount of $395, which shall be paid by August 20, 2010. Order was signed in open court. Judge Donald Sullivan. Not Reported.

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Answers To First Set Of Specially Prepared Interrogatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: STANLEY DALE RADTKE, ESQ. for defendant and moving party; no other appearance stated. Tentative adopted.

DEFENDANT ADEL ABDEL AL GHAZALI's Motion for Order Compelling Answers to First Set of Specially Prepared Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond is a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to provide full, accurate and complete responses by August 6, 2010. Defendant is awarded Sanctions against Plaintiff in the amount of $390, which shall to be paid by August 20, 2010. Order was signed in open court. Judge Donald Sullivan. Not Reported.
